### Post by diafanos on 2008-05-26
Hi there!

After Hardy installation, I encounter problems when I try to start a game. 
(I tried it with Enemy territory and Urban Terror)

Specifically, when I try to run et, my monitor goes to standby mode and it appears a frequency-out-of-range message.

Can anyone help me?
I use a nvidia card.

Here is my xorg.conf file

```

# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings
# nvidia-settings:  version 1.0  (buildd@yellow)  Tue Mar  4 20:28:57 UTC 2008

Section "ServerLayout"
    Identifier     "Layout0"
    Screen      0  "Screen0" 0 0
    InputDevice    "Keyboard0" "CoreKeyboard"

    Option         "TwinViewXineramaInfoOrder" "CRT-0"
    Option         "metamodes" "1280x1024 +0+0; 1280x1024_75 +0+0; 1280x1024_60 +0+0; 1024x768 +0+0; 800x600 +0+0; 720x400 +0+0; 640x480 +0+0"
```

### Post by siroverload on 2009-08-01

---

### Post by diafanos on 2009-09-02
Hello siroverload.

I found a decent solution for the problem.
You have to start the game in windowed mode, go to options menu and change the resolution and color depth to supported values. Then you can start the game in fullscreen.

I hope, it will work for you, too.

---
